creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
www/webkit-gtk3 does not build. Yhis is valid for both poudriere and host environments. Final build message is:

/usr/bin/ld: Tools/DumpRenderTree/TestNetscapePlugIn/Tests/.libs/TestNetscapePlugin_libtestnetscapeplugin_la-DocumentOpenInDestroyStream.o: relocation R_X86_64_32S against `_ZTV27DocumentOpenInDestroyStream' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
Tools/DumpRenderTree/TestNetscapePlugIn/Tests/.libs/TestNetscapePlugin_libtestnetscapeplugin_la-DocumentOpenInDestroyStream.o: could not read symbols: Bad value
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake[1]: *** [TestNetscapePlugin/libtestnetscapeplugin.la] Error 1
gmake[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
c++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-pthread'
c++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-pthread'
c++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-pthread'
/usr/bin/ld: Source/JavaScriptCore/API/.libs/libjavascriptcoregtk_3_0_la-JSBase.o: relocation R_X86_64_32S against `_ZTVN3JSC14SourceProviderE' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
Source/JavaScriptCore/API/.libs/libjavascriptcoregtk_3_0_la-JSBase.o: could not read symbols: Bad value
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake[1]: *** [libjavascriptcoregtk-3.0.la] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/obj/asp/ports/www/webkit-gtk3/work/webkit-1.8.3'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in //ports/www/webkit-gtk3.

Fix: 

NA
How-To-Repeat: make www/webkit-gtk3
